statement.p: Alexia puts a pot of water from the tap onto the stove and turns the burner all the way up. The water temperature starts at 56\,^{\circ}F and climbs steadily up to the boiling point of 212\,^{\circ}F\text{,} raising at a rate of 22\,\frac{^{\circ}F}{\text{min}}\text{.} How long will it take for the pot to boil?
